name: Inferless
description: Serverless GPU platform for deploying ML models in minutes with sub-second cold starts and auto-scaling.

seo.title: Inferless — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Inferless: Serverless GPU platform for deploying ML models in minutes with sub-second cold starts and auto-scaling.

when_to_use: Deploying custom ML models via API with sub-second cold starts
Serverless GPU inference for LLMs and diffusion models
Autoscaling ML model endpoints without managing GPU clusters
Deploying Python model pipelines as REST APIs in minutes
Cost-efficient inference billing per-request on shared GPUs

cons: Newer player vs Replicate and Modal
review.verdict: A credible serverless GPU option for ML inference, especially when cold starts must stay tiny.
review.best_for: ML teams serving models with spiky, latency-sensitive traffic
review.not_for: Always-on training jobs or simple CPU-only APIs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
